title: elsholtzia strobilifera
intro: Elsholtzia strobilifera, also known as Vietnamese mint or Chinese hyssop, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. Medicinally, Elsholtzia strobilifera is valued for its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and promote digestion, making it a beneficial herb for the treatment of colds, coughs, and digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Elsholtzia strobilifera include teas, infusions, and essential oil extracts, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
